title: Unity Behaviour — Contract 5
description: Behavioural telemetry the Unity runtime tracks over a session and pushes over /ws/runtime. Two message types: 'behaviour_manifest' declares the behavioural channels once (merged into the active signal manifest), and 'behaviour_sample' streams their values as signal frames that feed the dashboard, rule engine, and recorder. Sent after the object-status manifest handshake.

channels.description: Channel definitions in the Contract 1 (signal_schema) channel shape, with display.group typically 'behavioural'.

payload.description: Map of behavioural channel name → numeric value for this frame. Non-numeric values are ignored by the backend.
